description: Perform a database-wide supply chain relocation simulation in openLCA. Import the USLCI database from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip and globally replace all inputs of 'Electricity, at grid, Eastern US' with 'Electricity, at grid, Western US'. Ensure the 'Electricity, at grid, Eastern US' flow is no longer used by any process and can be deleted. Document the completion of these actions in a log file at ~/LCA_Results/refactor_log.txt.
